titleStmt.title: SII 31.224: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 224. (A.R. No. B 267 of 1938.) PEDDACHAPALLE, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the maṇḍapa of the Agastyēśvara svāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1584, Śubhakṛit, Mārgaśira, ba. 13, corresponding to November 28, 1662 A.D.

Registers the lease given by Havāldāru Hamīru Saiṁdu Hussēnu-Sāhebu to the Kāṁpus and Karaṇams of the village of Chappelli. It records that the land area of Chappalli village and other villages (Saṁgaḍi grāmās) was measured earlier by a pole (ghaḍa) of non-standard length resulting the reduction of their original extent and the consequent desertion of the village by its tenets. The Sāhebu ordered this official Ānanda Dharmmāji Aṁtōpantulu to re-measure the said village with a standard pole, measuring 24, cubits (mūras) and also the reḍḍis and karaṇams were asked to follow the same standard measurement for measuring the lands.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1584 Agunēṭi śubhakṛtu saṁvatsara mā
rggaśira ba 12 lu . śādatpannānigā batu yijat da
stugā hamīrusaiṁdu husēnu sāhebu saradāvāldā
rumahallāyatihayagāru callappalli pulimēra
reḍi liṁgāreḍi pāpireḍḍi kāṁpulu putta buccire
ḍi mōvūri vōbuḷareḍi gōsula gaṁggaya pāpi
reḍigāri sidappa yōrāśi cennumodalayina kāṁpu
lakuṁnnu karaṇāla muddarāju perumāḷu be
ḍu dūri tippakuṁṭla yallappa modalaina
karaṇālaku Iccinakaulu śāsana kramameṭlannanu mīgrāmā
naku saṁggaḍigrāmālalō polaṁ kolicē ghaḍha prakā
raṁkāka piccapaiḍai tūmulu koṁccamaina nimitta dīvā
ṇavāru saṁggaḍigrāmālatō Aṭṭeyi grāmamu
nnu cūcēṭaṁduvallanu kāṁpulu nirvahiṁcalēka nā
nādēśālakunu viḍici pōtiṁ ganaka mī
ku kauluku Iccigrāmānaku rābaṭṭina vivaraṁ mīgrāmaṁ
polaṁ cēlumaḷlu kamulāpuraṁlō naḍicē Iruvaiyi nā
lugu mūrala ghaḍhaprakārāna cēnu tūmu nūrukuṁṭala
prāptini maḍitūmu padikuṁṭala prāptini kolapiṁcci
yippiṁcemani rābaṭi yīprakāraṁ polaṁcēnu ma
ḷlu kolipiṁcci yippiṁcumani mānikharvā Ānaṁda
dharmāji Aṁtōpaṁtulaku śalavu yicci Ācaṁ
drārkasdhāIgā naḍicēṭaṭlugānu kolapiṁci yi
ppiṁntimi ganaka yīpaddhatini tappaka naḍipiṁcagalavāra
ṁ polamamīra mānyālu reḍikaraṇīka mānyālu cēlumaḷu yī ghaḍhapra
kāramē kolipiṁci kotipiṁcagalavāraṁ yīkolataprakāraṁ Aragha
ḍa yī maṁḍapaṁ vuttarapujagatini viḷāsaṁ vēIṁcināramu .
Digital edition of SII 31.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
